general: BIO-235 is the prime prerequisite for most upper-level biology electives and must be completed by end of sophomore year. MTH-135 or STA-100/110 can be taken any semester during the first two years. 11 courses needed for the major.

variant_notes.standard: Default track for Biology majors. CHM sequence begins sophomore year unless pre-med.
variant_notes.advanced: For pre-med students and those with strong high school science background (ACT ≥ 25). CHM sequence begins immediately.
variant_notes.typical: For students with limited high school science background. Fall 2026: use BIO-100 instead of BIO-120 (BIO-120 not offered).
